Title: data-injest
Description: This page demonstrates the data-injest attribute natively fetching CSS / Scripts (like Tailwind and DaisyUI) dynamically and suspending DOM rendering until parsing completes.
Extensibility: The data-injest module manages the lifecycle of external dependencies, ensuring that the DOM remains hidden until all specified resources are fully loaded and parsed.
Snippet: DaisyUI & Tailwind Dynamically Injected!
